faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our home automation services.

q1.question: What is home automation and how can it benefit my home?
q1.answer: Home automation is the intelligent automation of the home that allows you to control lighting, climate, security and appliances from an app or by voice. It benefits your home by improving comfort, increasing security, reducing energy consumption by up to 30% and raising property value.

q2.question: How much does it cost to install a home automation system?
q2.answer: The cost varies depending on the scope of the project. A basic smart lighting system can start from $2,000, while a complete home automation can range from $10,000 to $50,000 depending on size and desired features. We offer customized quotes with no obligation.

q3.question: Is it possible to automate an already built house?
q3.answer: Yes, most of our solutions are retrofit, meaning they can be installed in existing homes without major construction. We use wireless technologies like Zigbee, Z-Wave and WiFi that minimize structural intervention.

q4.question: What brands and home automation protocols do you use?
q4.answer: We work with market-leading brands such as KNX, Lutron, Control4, Crestron and Savant. We also integrate devices from popular ecosystems like Apple HomeKit, Google Home and Amazon Alexa for maximum compatibility.

q5.question: How long does a complete system installation take?
q5.answer: A basic installation can be completed in 2-3 days. For more complex projects like complete home automation, the average time is 2 to 4 weeks, including custom configuration and programming of all systems.

q6.question: Can I control my house from my phone when I'm away?
q6.answer: Absolutely. All our systems include secure remote access through mobile applications. You can monitor security cameras, adjust temperature, turn on lights and receive real-time alerts from anywhere in the world.

q7.question: What happens if the power or internet goes out?
q7.answer: Our systems are designed with redundancy. In case of power outage, critical devices like locks and alarms have backup batteries. If internet connectivity is lost, local devices continue to work with programmed automations.

q8.question: Do you offer maintenance and technical support?
q8.answer: Yes, we offer preventive maintenance plans and 24/7 technical support. Our team can diagnose and resolve most issues remotely, and we have technicians available for on-site visits when necessary.

maria.content: IHomotic completely transformed our home. The automation system is intuitive and has helped us significantly reduce energy consumption. The team was professional and attentive at all times.

james.content: We implemented IHomotic solutions in our corporate offices and the result was exceptional. Energy efficiency improved by 40% and access control is impeccable.

ana.content: As an architect, I have collaborated with IHomotic on several projects. Their ability to integrate technology in an elegant and functional way is outstanding. I highly recommend them.
